200.description: Kentucky Office of Vital Statistics issues certified copies of birth, death, marriage, divorce, and stillbirth records for events that occurred in Kentucky (birth records from 1911 forward). A certified birth certificate is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID. Order in person at the Frankfort office, by mail, online through VitalChek, or via will-call pickup after an online order. Fee: $10 per certificate (non-refundable search fee). Walk-in customers may pay by cash, check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or debit/credit (+$2.50 processing fee). Same-day service not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.
200.description_es: La Oficina de Estadísticas Vitales de Kentucky emite copias certificadas de nacimiento, defunción, matrimonio, divorcio y mortinato ocurridos en Kentucky (nacimientos desde 1911). Se requiere certificado de nacimiento certificado para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal. Solicite en persona en Frankfort, por correo, en línea por VitalChek o recogida will-call. Tarifa: $10 por certificado (tarifa de búsqueda no reembolsable). Servicio el mismo día no garantizado después de las 3:45 p.m.
200.notes: VitalChek online/phone: 1-877-817-7362 or vitalchek.com. Mail applications to OVS, 275 East Main Street, 1E-A, Frankfort, KY 40621. Drop box at visitor entrance for after-hours applications.
200.notes_es: VitalChek en línea/teléfono: 1-877-817-7362 o vitalchek.com. Envíe solicitudes por correo a OVS, 275 East Main Street, 1E-A, Frankfort, KY 40621.
200.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. EST (walk-in lobby until 3:30 p.m.; same-day not guaranteed after 3:45 p.m.)
200.services: Certified birth certificates|Death marriage divorce records|Mail and online ordering|Will-call pickup|Record amendments

201.description: Kentucky Transportation Cabinet Driver Licensing (DRIVE) issues standard and REAL ID driver's licenses and personal identification cards at regional offices statewide. Returning citizens with felony convictions can use a Felon Release Letter from KDOC, Division of Probation and Parole, Federal Bureau of Prisons (Kentucky facility), or U.S. Probation Office—plus a certified U.S. birth certificate—as primary identity proof for a standard credential. Letter must be presented within 30 calendar days of its issue date. Use the IDocument Guide at drive.ky.gov to build a personalized document checklist before visiting.
201.description_es: Licencias de conducir e identificaciones del Gabinete de Transporte de Kentucky (DRIVE) se emiten en oficinas regionales. Ciudadanos que regresan con condenas previas pueden usar Carta de Liberación del KDOC, División de Libertad Condicional, Buró Federal de Prisiones (instalación en Kentucky) o Oficina de Libertad Condicional de EE.UU.—más certificado de nacimiento certificado de EE.UU. La carta debe presentarse dentro de 30 días calendario. Use la Guía IDocument en drive.ky.gov antes de visitar.
201.notes: Schedule appointments at any Driver Licensing Regional Office via drive.ky.gov. Under supervision, release letter must be notarized and signed by supervising officer. REAL ID requires additional documentation.
201.notes_es: Programe citas en oficinas regionales en drive.ky.gov. Bajo supervisión, la carta debe estar notarizada y firmada por el oficial supervisor. REAL ID requiere documentación adicional.
201.hours: Regional office hours vary; appointments recommended—check drive.ky.gov for locations
201.services: Driver's licenses|State ID cards|Felon Release Letter processing|IDocument eligibility guide|Regional office appointments

202.description: Kentucky Driver Licensing handles license reinstatement after suspensions. Standard reinstatement/re-licensing fee is $40 (pay online via myDrive, in person, by mail with certified check/money order payable to Kentucky State Treasurer, or by phone at 502-564-1257 with debit/credit). Paying the fee alone does not restore driving privileges—all suspension conditions (court orders, DUI classes, ignition interlock, etc.) must be satisfied first. If suspended more than one year, vision and written tests are required before reinstatement. Active ID card must be canceled before paying reinstatement fee.
202.description_es: Licencias de Kentucky maneja restablecimiento después de suspensiones. Tarifa estándar de restablecimiento: $40 (pague en línea por myDrive, en persona, por correo con cheque certificado/giro al Kentucky State Treasurer, o por teléfono al 502-564-1257). Pagar la tarifa sola no restaura privilegios—deben cumplirse todas las condiciones de suspensión. Si la suspensión supera un año, se requieren exámenes de visión y escritos. Debe cancelar identificación activa antes de pagar.
202.notes: Schedule written/road tests through Kentucky State Police at kentuckystatepolice.ky.gov/driver-testing. myDrive portal (drive.ky.gov) is Kentucky's online driver services hub.
202.notes_es: Programe exámenes escritos/carretera con Kentucky State Police en kentuckystatepolice.ky.gov/driver-testing. Portal myDrive en drive.ky.gov.
202.hours: Reinstatement payments: online 24/7; phone and regional offices during business hours
202.services: Reinstatement fee payment|Suspension requirement guidance|myDrive online portal|Testing referral information|Mail and phone payment options

203.description: Social Security Administration field office in downtown Louisville (Gene Snyder U.S. Courthouse) handles Social Security card replacement, new cards, SSN verification, and retirement/disability benefit applications. A Social Security card or number verification is required for Kentucky driver's licenses, employment, and most public benefits. As of January 2025, SSA field offices operate on an appointment-focused model—call ahead or use ssa.gov to schedule in-person service. Many services available online at ssa.gov without a visit.
203.description_es: Oficina de la SSA en el centro de Louisville (Tribunal Gene Snyder) maneja reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, tarjetas nuevas, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Se requiere tarjeta o verificación de SSN para licencias de Kentucky, empleo y la mayoría de beneficios públicos. Desde enero de 2025, las oficinas operan con citas—llame o use ssa.gov. Muchos servicios disponibles en línea sin visita.
203.notes: Appointment phone: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. National line: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). Entrance on 6th Street at Broadway; Room 101, 1st floor.
203.notes_es: Teléfono de citas: (866) 716-9671. TTY: (502) 582-5517. Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213. Entrada en 6th Street y Broadway; Sala 101.
203.hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.; Wednesday 9:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
203.services: Social Security card replacement|SSN verification|Retirement and disability applications|Medicare enrollment assistance|Appointment scheduling

204.description: SSA field office serving Fayette County and Central Kentucky, located off Winchester Road near the I-64/I-75 interchange. Provides Social Security card replacement, SSN verification, and benefit applications. Required for employment and obtaining Kentucky ID. Appointment recommended under SSA's appointment-focused service model effective January 2025—call local office or 1-800-772-1213. Ground-floor office; many transactions completable online at ssa.gov.
204.description_es: Oficina de la SSA que sirve al Condado de Fayette y centro de Kentucky, cerca de Winchester Road e intercambio I-64/I-75. Ofrece reemplazo de tarjeta del Seguro Social, verificación de SSN y solicitudes de beneficios. Cita recomendada bajo el modelo de citas de la SSA desde enero de 2025. Oficina en planta baja; muchas transacciones en línea en ssa.gov.
204.notes: Appointment phone: (866) 530-7754. TTY: (859) 294-5753. From I-75 Exit 110 (US 60 West), turn at Country Inn and Suites, then right on Buena Vista Rd.
204.notes_es: Teléfono de citas: (866) 530-7754. TTY: (859) 294-5753. Desde I-75 Salida 110, gire en Country Inn and Suites, luego derecha en Buena Vista Rd.
204.hours: Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.; Wednesday 9:00 a.m.–12:00 p.m.
204.services: Social Security card replacement|SSN verification|Retirement and disability applications|Medicare enrollment|Appointment scheduling

205.description: Use SSA's national office locator to find the nearest Social Security field office anywhere in Kentucky. A Social Security number and card (or SSA verification letter) is required to obtain a Kentucky driver's license or state ID and for most employment. Call 1-800-772-1213 for automated services and appointment scheduling, or visit ssa.gov for online card replacement and benefit applications. As of 2025, in-person field office visits generally require an appointment.
205.description_es: Use el localizador nacional de la SSA para encontrar la oficina más cercana en Kentucky. Se necesita número y tarjeta del Seguro Social (o carta de verificación) para licencia de conducir o identificación estatal y para la mayoría del empleo. Llame al 1-800-772-1213 para servicios automatizados y citas, o visite ssa.gov. Desde 2025, las visitas en persona generalmente requieren cita.
205.notes: National toll-free: 1-800-772-1213 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Online services at ssa.gov/myaccount for many card and benefit needs.
205.notes_es: Línea nacional: 1-800-772-1213 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–7 p.m.). TTY: 1-800-325-0778. Servicios en línea en ssa.gov/myaccount.
205.hours: National phone line Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–7:00 p.m.; field office hours vary by location
205.services: Office location search|Appointment scheduling referral|Online service directory|SSN and card information

220.description: Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) helps eligible Kentucky households pay heating, cooling, and crisis utility bills. Administered through local Community Action Agencies in all 120 counties via Community Action Kentucky (CAPKY). Three components: Subsidy (seasonal, typically November–December), Crisis (heating emergencies, January–March), and Summer Subsidy (cooling, July–September). Income at or below 150% of Federal Poverty Guidelines. Apply at your county's Community Action office—call 1-800-456-3452 or use capky.org/network to find your local agency.
220.description_es: LIHEAP ayuda a hogares elegibles de Kentucky a pagar facturas de calefacción, refrigeración y crisis. Administrado por Agencias de Acción Comunitaria en 120 condados vía CAPKY. Tres componentes: Subsidio (noviembre–diciembre), Crisis (emergencias de calefacción, enero–marzo) y Subsidio de Verano (refrigeración, julio–septiembre). Ingresos hasta 150% de las Pautas Federales de Pobreza. Solicite en su oficina local—llame al 1-800-456-3452 o use capky.org/network.
220.notes: Crisis component requires disconnect/past-due notice or proof of low fuel. Bring SSN for all household members, prior-month income proof, and utility bills. Prior LIHEAP assistance does not affect Crisis eligibility.
220.notes_es: Componente Crisis requiere aviso de desconexión o combustible bajo. Traiga SSN de todos los miembros, comprobante de ingresos del mes anterior y facturas de servicios.
220.hours: Local agency hours vary; statewide info line during business hours
220.services: Heating and cooling bill assistance|Crisis utility intervention|Subsidy payments to utility vendors|Local agency referral|Weatherization referrals

221.description: Northern Kentucky Community Action Commission (NKCAC) administers LIHEAP and other financial assistance for Boone, Campbell, Carroll, Gallatin, Grant, Kenton, Owen, and Pendleton counties. LIHEAP Subsidy provides seasonal electric/heating credits; Crisis component assists households with disconnect notices or within four days of running out of bulk fuel (January–March, walk-ins accepted within 48 hours of disconnect). Also offers Head Start, job training, adult education, and weatherization. Schedule LIHEAP appointments online at nkcac.10to8.com or call (859) 484-8450.
221.description_es: NKCAC administra LIHEAP y otra asistencia financiera en ocho condados del norte de Kentucky. Subsidio LIHEAP ofrece créditos estacionales; componente Crisis ayuda con avisos de desconexión o combustible a granel bajo (enero–marzo). También ofrece Head Start, capacitación laboral y climaización. Programe citas LIHEAP en nkcac.10to8.com o llame al (859) 484-8450.
221.notes: Kenton County LIHEAP center: 533 W. Pike Street, Covington, KY 41011; (859) 655-2959. LIHEAP dedicated line: (859) 655-2959. Income up to 150% FPL.
221.notes_es: Centro LIHEAP Condado Kenton: 533 W. Pike Street, Covington; (859) 655-2959. Ingresos hasta 150% FPL.
221.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:30 a.m.–4:00 p.m. (neighborhood centers; LIHEAP by appointment)
221.services: LIHEAP Subsidy and Crisis|Weatherization|Head Start|Job training and adult education|Crisis financial assistance

222.description: kynect is Kentucky's online benefits portal for applying for KTAP (Kentucky Transitional Assistance Program) cash assistance, SNAP food benefits, Medicaid, Child Care Assistance Program (CCAP), and other programs. KTAP provides monthly cash aid to low-income families with dependent children, with a 60-month lifetime limit, plus work support through Kentucky Works. Apply online at kynect.ky.gov, by phone at 855-306-8959, or in person at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Use the prescreening tool before applying to check potential eligibility.
222.description_es: kynect es el portal en línea de beneficios de Kentucky para KTAP (asistencia en efectivo), SNAP, Medicaid, CCAP y otros programas. KTAP proporciona ayuda mensual a familias de bajos ingresos con hijos dependientes, con límite de 60 meses de por vida. Solicite en kynect.ky.gov, al 855-306-8959 o en cualquier oficina DCBS en 120 condados. Use la herramienta de preselección antes de solicitar.
222.notes: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET). Requires Kentucky Online Gateway (KOG) account. KTAP recipients may qualify for childcare and transportation assistance through Kentucky Works.
222.notes_es: DCBS Call Services: 855-306-8959 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–5 p.m. ET). Requiere cuenta Kentucky Online Gateway (KOG). Beneficiarios KTAP pueden calificar para cuidado infantil y transporte.
222.hours: Phone line Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. ET; online applications 24/7
222.services: KTAP cash assistance applications|SNAP and Medicaid enrollment|Child Care Assistance|Kentucky Works referrals|Online benefits management

223.description: Kentucky 211 connects residents to local emergency financial assistance, food, housing, utilities, mental health services, and other community resources. Dial 2-1-1 from any phone or text your zip code to 898211 to reach a trained specialist 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Service provided through United Way of Kentucky's network covering all 120 counties. Free, confidential, and available in multiple languages with interpreter support. Also searchable online at kentucky211.org.
223.description_es: Kentucky 211 conecta a residentes con asistencia financiera de emergencia, alimentos, vivienda, servicios públicos, salud mental y otros recursos comunitarios. Marque 2-1-1 o envíe su código postal al 898211 para hablar con un especialista las 24 horas. Servicio de la red United Way de Kentucky en 120 condados. Gratuito, confidencial y con intérpretes. También busque en línea en kentucky211.org.
223.notes: Text zip code to 898211 (no hyphen). 211 does not provide direct cash assistance—specialists refer to local programs. Pairs with kynect.ky.gov for benefits applications.
223.notes_es: Envíe código postal al 898211. 211 no proporciona efectivo directo—refiere a programas locales. Complementa kynect.ky.gov para beneficios.
223.hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
223.services: Emergency resource navigation|Utility and housing referrals|Food assistance connections|Mental health resource referrals|Multi-language interpreter support

224.description: Bank On Louisville is a city-led coalition connecting Louisville residents—including those with ChexSystems or prior banking problems—to certified low-cost checking accounts at mainstream banks and credit unions. Certified accounts meet national Bank On standards: no overdraft or NSF fees, $5 or less monthly, free deposits/withdrawals/bill pay. Participating institutions include Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank, Park Community Credit Union, and others. Also offers financial education and connects to the Louisville Financial Empowerment Center for free one-on-one counseling.
224.description_es: Bank On Louisville es una coalición municipal que conecta a residentes de Louisville—incluso con historial en ChexSystems—a cuentas corrientes certificadas de bajo costo. Cuentas certificadas: sin cargos por sobregiro, $5 o menos al mes, depósitos/retiros/pagos gratis. Instituciones participantes incluyen Bank of America, Chase, Fifth Third, PNC, U.S. Bank y Park Community Credit Union. También ofrece educación financiera y el Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero.
224.notes: Led by Louisville Metro Office of Resilience and Community Services. Visit bankonlouisville.org for current certified account list. Financial Empowerment Center: free debt, credit, and banking counseling for Louisville residents.
224.notes_es: Dirigido por la Oficina de Resiliencia y Servicios Comunitarios de Louisville. Visite bankonlouisville.org para lista de cuentas certificadas. Centro de Empoderamiento Financiero: asesoría gratuita.
224.hours: Online resources 24/7; coalition office Mon–Fri business hours
224.services: Certified low-fee checking account referrals|Financial education workshops|Financial Empowerment Center counseling|ChexSystems-friendly banking connections

225.description: Commonwealth Credit Union offers 20/20 Checking—a second-chance account for members rebuilding after negative banking history. No minimum balance; $10 monthly fee; free Visa debit card with mobile wallet access; digital banking included. After one year of responsible use, members may transition to a standard commonWEALTH Checking account. Serves Central Kentucky with 17 branch locations. Membership open to those who live, work, worship, or attend school in eligible Kentucky counties.
225.description_es: Commonwealth Credit Union ofrece 20/20 Checking—cuenta de segunda oportunidad para miembros que reconstruyen después de historial bancario negativo. Sin saldo mínimo; $10 mensuales; tarjeta Visa débito gratis; banca digital incluida. Después de un año de uso responsable, puede pasar a commonWEALTH Checking. Sirve al centro de Kentucky con 17 sucursales.
225.notes: Lexington Hamburg branch: 2540 Sir Barton Way, Lexington. Eligibility requirements apply—contact a Financial Service Representative. Also offers Round UP and Power Checking accounts.
225.notes_es: Sucursal Lexington Hamburg: 2540 Sir Barton Way. Aplican requisitos de elegibilidad—contacte a un representante. También ofrece Round UP y Power Checking.
225.hours: Contact Center Mon–Fri 8:30 a.m.–5:00 p.m., Sat 9:00 a.m.–12:30 p.m.; branch hours vary
225.services: 20/20 second-chance checking|Visa debit card|Digital and mobile banking|Account upgrade pathway|Multiple Central KY branch locations

240.description: Transit Authority of River City (TARC) operates public bus service throughout Louisville and Jefferson County with 24+ fixed routes and 3,400+ stops—primary transit for people without vehicles. Adult fare $2.25 per ride (effective March 2026); reduced fares $1.00 for seniors, students, and eligible riders. Passes: 24-hour ($5), 7-day ($25), 30-day ($75). Pay with MyTARC card, Token Transit app, or exact cash. TARC3 paratransit available for eligible riders with disabilities. Customer service at 1000 W. Broadway.
240.description_es: TARC opera autobuses públicos en Louisville y el Condado de Jefferson con más de 24 rutas y 3,400 paradas—transporte principal para personas sin vehículo. Tarifa adulto $2.25 por viaje; tarifa reducida $1.00. Pases: 24 horas ($5), 7 días ($25), 30 días ($75). Pague con tarjeta MyTARC, app Token Transit o efectivo exacto. TARC3 paratransit para personas elegibles con discapacidades.
240.notes: MyTARC card kiosk: 1000 W. Broadway, Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. Real-time schedules at ridetarc.org or Transit app. Network redesign launching August 2026.
240.notes_es: Quiosco MyTARC: 1000 W. Broadway, lun–vie 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. Horarios en tiempo real en ridetarc.org o app Transit.
240.hours: Route hours vary; customer service Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m.
240.services: Fixed-route bus service|TARC3 paratransit|MyTARC fare card|Token Transit mobile payment|Reduced fare programs

241.description: Lextran is Lexington and Fayette County's public bus system operating 26 fixed routes 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Standard fare $1.00 per trip; half fares ($0.50) for seniors 62+ and people with disabilities with Lextran ID card. Service spans 5:00 a.m.–12:30 a.m. weekdays/Saturdays and 5:00 a.m.–9:30 p.m. Sundays. Downtown Transit Center at 150 E. Vine Street is the route hub. Lextran Wheels paratransit serves riders who cannot use fixed routes.
241.description_es: Lextran es el sistema de autobuses públicos de Lexington y Fayette con 26 rutas los 7 días del año. Tarifa estándar $1.00 por viaje; media tarifa ($0.50) para mayores de 62 años y personas con discapacidad con tarjeta Lextran. Servicio de 5:00 a.m. a 12:30 a.m. entre semana/sábados. Centro de Tránsito en 150 E. Vine Street. Lextran Wheels paratransit para quienes no pueden usar rutas fijas.
241.notes: Transit Center: 150 E. Vine St, M–F 6 a.m.–5:45 p.m., Sat 8 a.m.–4 p.m. Admin office: 200 W. Loudon Ave, M–F 8 a.m.–5 p.m. Passes available at Kroger and admin office.
241.notes_es: Centro de Tránsito: 150 E. Vine St. Oficina administrativa: 200 W. Loudon Ave. Pases disponibles en Kroger y oficina administrativa.
241.hours: Routes approximately 5:00 a.m.–12:30 a.m. (weekdays); Transit Center M–F 6:00 a.m.–5:45 p.m., Sat 8:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m.
241.services: Fixed-route bus service|Lextran Wheels paratransit|Reduced and half fares|Daily weekly and monthly passes|Downtown Transit Center

242.description: Transit Authority of Northern Kentucky (TANK) provides public bus service in Boone, Campbell, and Kenton counties with connections to downtown Cincinnati. Operates 27 routes, 19 park-and-ride locations, and the RAMP paratransit program for riders with disabilities, 365 days a year. Covington Transit Center on Madison Avenue is a major hub. Essential transportation for NKY residents without vehicles traveling to work, appointments, and Cincinnati-area destinations.
242.description_es: TANK proporciona autobuses públicos en los condados Boone, Campbell y Kenton con conexiones al centro de Cincinnati. Opera 27 rutas, 19 park-and-ride y paratransit RAMP para personas con discapacidades, 365 días al año. Centro de Tránsito de Covington en Madison Avenue es un hub principal. Transporte esencial para residentes de NKY sin vehículo.
242.notes: Lost & found and customer service: 859-331-TANK (8265), Mon–Fri 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Schedules and fare info at tankbus.org. Partners with Cincinnati SORTA for cross-river service.
242.notes_es: Objetos perdidos y servicio al cliente: 859-331-TANK, lun–vie 7 a.m.–6 p.m. Horarios en tankbus.org. Socio de Cincinnati SORTA para servicio transfronterizo.
242.hours: Route hours vary by line; administration Mon–Fri 7:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m.
242.services: Fixed-route bus service|RAMP paratransit|Cincinnati cross-river connections|Park-and-ride locations|Route planning and schedules

260.description: Kentucky's child support program is administered by the Office of the Attorney General as the Department of Child Support Services (DCSS), effective July 1, 2025 (previously under CHFS). Handles establishment of paternity and support orders, modification, enforcement, wage withholding, and payment tracking for cases statewide. Custodial and non-custodial parents can apply online, make payments, and manage cases through kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Hotline for case assistance; 24/7 automated payment info at 800-443-1576.
260.description_es: El programa de manutención de menores de Kentucky es administrado por la Fiscalía General como DCSS, desde el 1 de julio de 2025. Maneja paternidad, órdenes de manutención, modificación, ejecución, retención salarial y seguimiento de pagos. Padres custodios y no custodios pueden solicitar, pagar y gestionar casos en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov. Línea de ayuda; información automatizada 24/7 al 800-443-1576.
260.notes: Hotline: (800) 248-1163 (Mon–Fri 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Mail payments: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059. K-TAP recipients receive services automatically.
260.notes_es: Línea: (800) 248-1163 (lun–vie 8 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET). IVR 24/7: (800) 443-1576. Pagos por correo: P.O. Box 14059, Lexington, KY 40512-4059.
260.hours: Hotline Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET; online portal 24/7
260.services: Child support order establishment|Paternity establishment|Payment processing and tracking|Wage withholding enforcement|Online case management portal

261.description: Jefferson County Attorney's Office Child Support Division—Kentucky's largest county child support office with nearly 55,000 active cases—provides local enforcement for Jefferson County residents under contract with the state DCSS (Attorney General). Services include locating non-custodial parents, establishing and modifying orders, medical support, payment monitoring, and enforcement. Apply in person, online at kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov, or by phone. Cash payments accepted at Bishop Lane office and Hall of Justice downtown.
261.description_es: División de Manutención de Menores del Fiscal del Condado de Jefferson—la oficina más grande de Kentucky—proporciona ejecución local para residentes del condado bajo contrato con DCSS estatal. Servicios incluyen localización de padres no custodios, establecimiento y modificación de órdenes, apoyo médico y monitoreo de pagos. Solicite en persona, en kentuckychildsupport.ky.gov o por teléfono.
261.notes: Payment window: Mon–Fri 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. at 1930 Bishop Lane and Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St, 1st floor). After-hours drop box at both locations. State hotline: (800) 248-1163.
261.notes_es: Ventanilla de pagos: lun–vie 8:00 a.m.–4:45 p.m. en 1930 Bishop Lane y Hall of Justice (600 W. Jefferson St). Buzón después de horas en ambos lugares.
261.hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. (phones 8:30 a.m.–4:30 p.m.; payment window until 4:45 p.m.)
261.services: Local child support enforcement|Paternity and order establishment|Payment collection and monitoring|Non-custodial parent location|Medical support orders

262.description: KVC Kentucky is a nonprofit child welfare and behavioral health organization headquartered in Lexington, serving more than 22,000 children and families annually across eight Kentucky regions. Family First Preservation and Reunification Services help families stay together or reunify after out-of-home placement through in-home, evidence-based support coordinated with DCBS. Also provides behavioral health, substance abuse treatment, and foster care services. All preservation/reunification referrals come through the Department for Community Based Services (DCBS)—contact your DCBS worker to initiate.
262.description_es: KVC Kentucky es una organización sin fines de lucro de bienestar infantil y salud conductual con sede en Lexington, que sirve a más de 22,000 niños y familias anualmente en ocho regiones. Servicios de Preservación y Reunificación Familiar ayudan a familias a permanecer juntas o reunificarse después de separación, coordinados con DCBS. También ofrece salud conductual, tratamiento de sustancias y cuidado de crianza. Referidos de preservación/reunificación vienen de DCBS.
262.notes: Referral required from DCBS for Family First services—cannot self-refer for preservation/reunification. For behavioral health intake, contact KVC directly at (859) 254-1035.
262.notes_es: Se requiere referido de DCBS para servicios Family First—no puede auto-referirse. Para admisión de salud conductual, contacte KVC al (859) 254-1035.
262.hours: Monday–Friday during business hours; behavioral health intake by appointment
262.services: Family preservation services|Family reunification support|In-home behavioral health|Substance abuse treatment|Foster care (separate program)

263.description: The Center for Women and Families provides 24/7 trauma-informed advocacy, crisis response, emergency shelter, and support for survivors of intimate partner violence and sexual assault across nine Kentuckiana counties (Jefferson, Bullitt, Henry, Oldham, Shelby, Spencer, Trimble in KY; Clark and Floyd in IN). Highly relevant for women leaving incarceration with domestic violence history. Louisville campus at 927 S. 2nd Street open 24 hours with emergency shelter. Toll-free crisis line available statewide.
263.description_es: The Center for Women and Families ofrece defensa informada sobre trauma 24/7, respuesta a crisis, refugio de emergencia y apoyo a sobrevivientes de violencia de pareja y agresión sexual en nueve condados de Kentuckiana. Muy relevante para mujeres que salen del encarcelamiento con historial de violencia doméstica. Campus de Louisville en 927 S. 2nd Street abierto 24 horas con refugio de emergencia.
263.notes: Toll-free 24/7 crisis line: 1-844-237-2331. Louisville local crisis line: (502) 581-7222. Walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9 a.m.–5 p.m. at 927 S. 2nd St. Interpreters available for all languages.
263.notes_es: Línea de crisis 24/7 gratuita: 1-844-237-2331. Línea local Louisville: (502) 581-7222. Atención sin cita lun–vie 9 a.m.–5 p.m. Intérpretes disponibles.
263.hours: 24/7 crisis line and Louisville campus; walk-in advocacy Mon–Fri 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.
263.services: 24/7 crisis hotline|Emergency shelter|Sexual assault forensic exams|Safety planning|Legal and housing advocacy|Children's services

280.description: Reflections of Hope provides Adult Peer Support Specialist (APSS) certification training dual-certified for both Kentucky and Ohio—one training yielding credentials in both states. Also offers Community Support Associate (CSA) training for Kentucky. Programs prepare individuals with lived experience in mental health or substance use recovery for peer support careers inside and outside the justice system, supporting reentry and recidivism reduction. Kentucky APSS requires 30+ hours of state-approved training, written and oral exams, and registration through DBHDID TRIS.
280.description_es: Reflections of Hope ofrece capacitación de Especialista en Apoyo entre Pares para Adultos (APSS) con certificación dual para Kentucky y Ohio—una capacitación, dos credenciales. También ofrece capacitación CSA para Kentucky. Prepara personas con experiencia vivida en salud mental o recuperación de sustancias para carreras de apoyo entre pares dentro y fuera del sistema judicial, apoyando la reinserción.
280.notes: KY requirements: 18+, high school diploma/GED, documented mental health or substance use diagnosis with pattern of recovery. Upload CEUs to tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Online 40-hour dual KY/OH certification available.
280.notes_es: Requisitos KY: 18+, diploma/GED, diagnóstico documentado de salud mental o sustancias con patrón de recuperación. Suba CEUs a tris.dbhdid.ky.gov. Certificación dual en línea de 40 horas disponible.
280.hours: Training schedules vary; online and in-person cohorts—check reflecthope.org
280.services: Adult Peer Support Specialist dual KY/OH certification|Community Support Associate training|Online certification courses|CEU upload guidance|Reentry peer workforce preparation
